'''dochathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:foelike|foelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foelike|foelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dochathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochathithi|dochathithi]] || [[word:dochathiji|dochathiji]] || [[word:dochathishi|dochathishi]] || [[word:dochathiki|dochathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochathuthuthu|dochathuthuthu]] || [[word:dochathujuju|dochathujuju]] || [[word:dochathushushu|dochathushushu]] || [[word:dochathukuku|dochathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochathuthu|dochathuthu]] || [[word:dochathuju|dochathuju]] || [[word:dochathushu|dochathushu]] || [[word:dochathuku|dochathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochathufthuf|dochathufthuf]] || [[word:dochathufjuf|dochathufjuf]] || [[word:dochathufshuf|dochathufshuf]] || [[word:dochathufkuf|dochathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochathethe|dochathethe]] || [[word:dochatheje|dochatheje]] || [[word:dochatheshe|dochatheshe]] || [[word:dochatheke|dochatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochathothotho|dochathothotho]] || [[word:dochathojojo|dochathojojo]] || [[word:dochathoshosho|dochathoshosho]] || [[word:dochathokoko|dochathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochathotho|dochathotho]] || [[word:dochathojo|dochathojo]] || [[word:dochathosho|dochathosho]] || [[word:dochathoko|dochathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochathofthof|dochathofthof]] || [[word:dochathofjof|dochathofjof]] || [[word:dochathofshof|dochathofshof]] || [[word:dochathofkof|dochathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfthĂŻf|dochathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfjĂŻf|dochathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfshĂŻf|dochathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfkĂŻf|dochathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|dochathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|dochathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|dochathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|dochathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfthĂŻf|dochathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfjĂŻf|dochathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfshĂŻf|dochathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfkĂŻf|dochathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfthĂŻf|dochathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfjĂŻf|dochathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfshĂŻf|dochathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:dochathĂŻfkĂŻf|dochathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dochathĂŠthĂŠ|dochathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:dochathĂŠjĂŠ|dochathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:dochathĂŠshĂŠ|dochathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:dochathĂŠkĂŠ|dochathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dochathathatha|dochathathatha]] || [[word:dochathajaja|dochathajaja]] || [[word:dochathashasha|dochathashasha]] || [[word:dochathakaka|dochathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dochathatha|dochathatha]] || [[word:dochathaja|dochathaja]] || [[word:dochathasha|dochathasha]] || [[word:dochathaka|dochathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dochathafthaf|dochathafthaf]] || [[word:dochathafjaf|dochathafjaf]] || [[word:dochathafshaf|dochathafshaf]] || [[word:dochathafkaf|dochathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dochathasha|dochathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochathshĂ«sha|dochathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochathrosha|dochathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochathmusha|dochathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochathyasha|dochathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochathnkshĂ«sha|godochathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochathnkrosha|godochathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochathnkmusha|godochathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochathnkyasha|godochathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dochachathasha|dochachathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochachathshĂ«sha|dochachathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochachathrosha|dochachathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochachathmusha|dochachathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochachathyasha|dochachathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochachathnkshĂ«sha|godochachathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochachathnkrosha|godochachathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochachathnkmusha|godochachathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochachathnkyasha|godochachathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dechĂŠthasha|dechĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dechĂŠthshĂ«sha|dechĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dechĂŠthrosha|dechĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dechĂŠthmusha|dechĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dechĂŠthyasha|dechĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godechĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|godechĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godechĂŠthnkrosha|godechĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godechĂŠthnkmusha|godechĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godechĂŠthnkyasha|godechĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dochfathasha|dochfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dochfathshĂ«sha|dochfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dochfathrosha|dochfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dochfathmusha|dochfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dochfathyasha|dochfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godochfathnkshĂ«sha|godochfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godochfathnkrosha|godochfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godochfathnkmusha|godochfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godochfathnkyasha|godochfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
